briefs.title: ICBC Rate Review Deadline Extended to 2027, December 2025 Filing Exempted
briefs.summary: BC extended ICBC's current policy year (the period used to set insurance rates) to March 31, 2027, and exempted ICBC from filing a general rate change application by December 15, 2025.

key_dates.label: ICBC general rate change filing exemption deadline — BC Utilities Commission
